description_long: This is a modern residential house complex composed of three distinct rectangular structures connected by paved walkways and driveways. The buildings feature flat roofs, large windows, and clean, white facades, with some sections incorporating wooden or gray accent panels. The property includes landscaped areas with trees, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor patios or decks. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic and maximizing natural light. The main entryways are set back from the street, with paved paths and minimalistic landscaping leading to the doors. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a sleek, geometric architectural style.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, white facades, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and patios.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from the side, highlighting the depth of the property, the flat roofs, and the arrangement of trees and patios.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct side view, clearly displaying the three separate building volumes, the pool area, and the wooden deck.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear perspective, emphasizing the pool, back patios, and the linear arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the front of the house complex, with the main entryways, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryways with flat doors, paved paths, and subtle landscaping; no prominent porch or columns.
